ops.title: cut v0.2.0 once wire v2/v3 + daemon.Runtime stabilize
ops.description: Every Go consumer pins v0.1.0, but HEAD now carries real unreleased API growth: wire session transport v2, bounded multiplexed protocol v3 (0891e6a), daemon.Runtime, and Swift SessionTransport. synckit dev-links via an untracked go.work to reach unreleased surface; a v0.2.0 tag lets it pin and drop the link, and lets the other consumers upgrade deliberately. Found during the 2026-07-19 fleet-migration audit.

ops.text: v0.2.0 tagged and pushed with CHANGELOG entry
synckit builds green pinned to v0.2.0 with no go.work present
